title: Soaking heat-insulating mobile phone rear shell film
abstract: The utility model discloses a soaking and heat-insulating mobile phone rear shell film which comprises a film body, wherein the film body is provided with a camera abdication hole corresponding to a mobile phone rear shell, the film body comprises a first adhesive layer, a heat dissipation layer, a second adhesive layer, a heat insulation layer and a packaging layer, and the outer end face of the first adhesive layer is used as an end face adhered to the mobile phone rear shell. According to the utility model, the soaking and heat-insulating film is adhered to the rear shell of the mobile phone, and the film uses the radiating fins to disperse the heat generated by the battery cell and the battery to the whole area, so that the overhigh local heat is avoided, the heat is uniformly dispersed, the heat transfer quantity which can be felt by a human body is reduced through the heat insulating layer, the heat is guided to the infrared coating to be emitted by the infrared coating in the non-holding area, the heat is conveniently guided to the part far away from the contact of the human hand, the heat contacted by the human hand is reduced, and the use comfort is improved.

title: Novel electroplating structure of CCS output electrode
abstract: The utility model discloses a novel electroplating structure of a CCS output electrode, which comprises a material belt, wherein a plurality of electroplating areas are formed on the material belt, the electroplating areas are stamped into a plurality of output electrodes after electroplating, the output electrodes are divided into a conducting part and an electroplating part, the conducting part is arranged on a separation plate, the electroplating part is connected with a conductive bar, the conducting part is connected with an FPC (flexible printed circuit) through a nickel sheet, and the FPC is arranged on the separation plate. The material belt pre-plating method has the advantages that 1, the plating structure is a planar structure and is simpler, the area needing shielding is simple, 2, the number of plating is single material belt, the number of used clamping tools is small, 3, the plating time is shortened, and the plating cost is reduced.

title: Air inlet mechanism and reaction device
abstract: The application provides an air inlet mechanism and a reaction device, wherein the air inlet mechanism is used for conveying air to a reaction furnace and comprises a first air pipe, the first air pipe extends along the vertical direction and is used for being communicated with the reaction furnace, a bearing seat is arranged in the bearing seat and is connected to the bottom of the first air pipe in the vertical direction and is connected with the first air pipe, the bearing groove is used for containing waste residues in the first air pipe, a slag discharging port is arranged on the bearing seat and is communicated with the bearing groove, and a sealing cover is detachably connected to the bearing seat and is used for shielding the slag discharging port. Through the air inlet mechanism and the reaction device provided by the application, waste residues can enter the receiving groove, and the waste residues in the receiving groove can be collected by opening the sealing cover. The smoothness of the gas flow in the air inlet mechanism can be improved, so that the effect of the reaction device on film coating processing of the sheet material is improved.
context: Title: Air inlet mechanism and reaction device Abstract: The application provides an air inlet mechanism and a reaction device, wherein the air inlet mechanism is used for conveying air to a reaction furnace and comprises a first air pipe, the first air pipe extends along the vertical direction and is used for being communicated with the reaction furnace, a bearing seat is arranged in the bearing seat and is connected to the bottom of the first air pipe in the vertical direction and is connected with the first air pipe, the bearing groove is used for containing waste residues in the first air pipe, a slag discharging port is arranged on the bearing seat and is communicated with the bearing groove, and a sealing cover is detachably connected to the bearing seat and is used for shielding the slag discharging port. title: Air intake unit and semiconductor manufacturing apparatus
abstract: The utility model provides an air inlet unit and semiconductor manufacturing equipment, wherein the air inlet unit comprises a first air inlet pipe and a second air inlet pipe, the air outlet end of the first air inlet pipe is arranged on the side wall or the bottom of a furnace body and used for providing process air to the interior of the furnace body along the direction parallel to a wafer, the air outlet end of the second air inlet pipe is arranged on the top of the furnace body and used for providing process air to the interior of the furnace body along the direction perpendicular to the wafer, the air outlet end of the second air inlet pipe is disc-shaped, a plurality of air outlet holes are uniformly arranged on the air outlet end of the second air inlet pipe, and the aperture of each air outlet hole is gradually reduced from the center of the air outlet end of the second air inlet pipe to the edge. The arrangement improves the uniformity of the gas field at the top of the furnace body by arranging the gas outlet end of the second gas inlet pipe at the top of the furnace body, and simultaneously, improves the uniformity of the distribution of the top gas flow by arranging the gas outlet end of the second gas inlet pipe into a disc shape.
context: Title: Air intake unit and semiconductor manufacturing apparatus Abstract: The utility model provides an air inlet unit and semiconductor manufacturing equipment, wherein the air inlet unit comprises a first air inlet pipe and a second air inlet pipe, the air outlet end of the first air inlet pipe is arranged on the side wall or the bottom of a furnace body and used for providing process air to the interior of the furnace body along the direction parallel to a wafer, the air outlet end of the second air inlet pipe is arranged on the top of the furnace body and used for providing process air to the interior of the furnace body along the direction perpendicular to the wafer, the air outlet end of the second air inlet pipe is disc-shaped, a plurality of air outlet holes are uniformly arranged on the air outlet end of the second air inlet pipe, and the aperture of each air outlet hole is gradually reduced from the center of the air outlet end of the second air inlet pipe to the edge. title: Thermocouple sensor for explosion field temperature test
abstract: A thermocouple sensor for explosion field temperature test comprises positive and negative thermocouple wire, front end conical head structure, rear end casing, alumina ceramic sleeve, compensation wire and inside pouring sealant, the alumina ceramic sleeve sets up in the rear end casing, the rear end casing front end has front end conical head structure, encapsulate through inside pouring sealant between rear end casing and the front end conical head structure, positive and negative thermocouple wire passes two through-holes of alumina ceramic sleeve respectively, and one end is connected with the positive and negative pole that the compensation wire corresponds, and the temperature measurement terminal surface is stretched out to the other end, directly contacts with explosion heat flow field. The utility model provides a thermocouple sensor for testing the temperature of an explosion field, which has remarkable advantages in the aspect of testing the temperature of the explosion field.
context: Title: Thermocouple sensor for explosion field temperature test Abstract: A thermocouple sensor for explosion field temperature test comprises positive and negative thermocouple wire, front end conical head structure, rear end casing, alumina ceramic sleeve, compensation wire and inside pouring sealant, the alumina ceramic sleeve sets up in the rear end casing, the rear end casing front end has front end conical head structure, encapsulate through inside pouring sealant between rear end casing and the front end conical head structure, positive and negative thermocouple wire passes two through-holes of alumina ceramic sleeve respectively, and one end is connected with the positive and negative pole that the compensation wire corresponds, and the temperature measurement terminal surface is stretched out to the other end, directly contacts with explosion heat flow field. title: Glass metering assembly and ozone generating device
abstract: The utility model provides a glass metering assembly and ozone generating device, foretell glass metering assembly includes glass rotameter, glass rotameter includes the float, the dead lever, glass pipe and elastic component, the dead lever sets up in the glass intraductal, the float activity sets up in the dead lever, the elastic component sets up on the dead lever is kept away from the one end of float, buffer pipeline assembly is including the intake pipe and the outlet duct of buckling that are linked together, the intake pipe of buckling is formed with buffering kink, buffering kink passes through the glass pipe and communicates in the outlet duct, and the threaded connection can be dismantled to the inlet end and the buffering kink of glass pipe, threaded connection can be dismantled with the outlet duct to the end of giving vent to anger of glass pipe. This glass metering component, the buffering kink that adds can carry out better buffering decompression to the compressed air of great air current, weakens the impact of float to the elastic component, not only avoids the float to strike the phenomenon of bad glass pipe, and improves the life of elastic component, and be convenient for dismouting or change glass rotameter.

title: Continuous scrap steel preheating device
abstract: The utility model discloses a continuous scrap steel preheating device, which belongs to the technical field of steel smelting and comprises a furnace body with a furnace door, an air inlet pipe and an air outlet pipe, wherein a heating part is arranged on the air inlet pipe, an air guide structure is arranged on the inner wall of the top of the furnace body, one end of the bottom of the furnace body is provided with a discharge hole, a lifting mechanism is arranged below the discharge hole, a feeding mechanism is arranged on the outer side of the furnace door and used for pushing scrap steel into the furnace body and the discharge hole, and a temperature measuring element is arranged on the side wall of the furnace body. The waste steel is pushed into the furnace body through the feeding mechanism, the flue gas is heated by the heating component and then is conveyed into the furnace body, the flue gas can be uniformly contacted with the waste steel through the gas flow guiding structure, the temperature in the furnace is detected in real time by the aid of the temperature measuring element, and the waste steel is discharged from the discharge hole under the cooperation of the feeding mechanism and the lifting mechanism after the waste steel is preheated. The utility model has the advantages of simple structure, low cost and high production efficiency, can realize continuous preheating of the scrap steel, uniformly heats the scrap steel by utilizing the waste heat of the flue gas, and improves the preheating efficiency and the preheating effect.

title: Furnace cover for graphitization furnace, graphitization furnace and battery preparation device
abstract: The application provides a furnace cover for a graphitizing furnace, the graphitizing furnace and a battery preparation device, wherein the furnace cover for the graphitizing furnace comprises a furnace cover body and a carbonaceous lining plate, the furnace cover body comprises a shell and a refractory lining body, wherein the shell is provided with an inner cavity with an open bottom, the refractory lining body is filled in the inner cavity of the shell, and the carbon lining plate is arranged on the lower surface of the refractory lining body. The carbon lining board is arranged on the lower surface of the refractory lining body, the material component of the carbon lining board is C, the thermal shock stability of the carbon material is excellent, the carbon material can withstand severe temperature change without being destroyed, and the chemical component of the carbon material is the same as that of the graphite of the lithium battery negative electrode active material, so that the graphitized product cannot be polluted. The carbon lining plate can isolate the direct contact between the refractory lining body in the furnace cover body and the cavity of the furnace body of the graphitization furnace, so that the problems of cracking, peeling, powder falling and pollution of graphite materials in the furnace due to the refractory lining body of the furnace cover for the graphitization furnace can be relieved.

title: Smelting equipment
abstract: The application discloses smelting equipment which comprises a side-blown smelting furnace, a converting device, a first discharging component, a second discharging component and a heat-preserving spray gun. The side-blown smelting furnace is provided with a production smoke outlet and an auxiliary smoke outlet, a first discharge assembly and a second discharge assembly are respectively used for opening and closing the production smoke outlet and the auxiliary smoke outlet, and the heat-preserving spray gun can heat the side-blown smelting furnace. In the normal production process, the production smoke outlet is opened, the auxiliary smoke outlet is closed, the smoke is discharged through the production smoke outlet, when smelting equipment fails and stops oxygen and materials, the production smoke outlet is closed, the auxiliary smoke outlet is opened, the melt in the side-blown smelting furnace is heated and insulated through the heat insulation spray gun, and the generated smoke is discharged through the auxiliary smoke outlet. Because the heat preservation spray gun can realize heating the melt, the temperature of the melt can be effectively prevented from dropping too much, the freezing degree of the melt is ensured to meet the requirement of air supply and feeding, and the condition of dead furnace is effectively avoided.

title: Graphitizing furnace
abstract: The application relates to a graphitizing furnace which comprises a furnace body, a tail gas treatment device, a liquid sealing device and a liquid sealing device, wherein the furnace body is provided with a reaction bin, the tail gas treatment device is communicated with the reaction bin through a tail gas pipe and is used for extracting smoke in the reaction bin, the liquid sealing device comprises an access pipe, a liquid sealing tank and an exhaust pipe, liquid is stored in the liquid sealing tank, one end of the access pipe is communicated with the tail gas pipe, the other end of the access pipe is communicated with the liquid sealing tank and extends below the liquid level of the liquid sealing tank, the exhaust pipe is communicated with the liquid sealing tank and is positioned above the liquid level of the liquid sealing tank, and at least part of smoke can be guided into the access pipe through the tail gas pipe under the positive pressure state by the reaction bin. The graphitizing furnace provided by the application can effectively reduce the probability that a large amount of volatile matters are gathered in the reaction bin to influence the normal operation of the graphitizing furnace, and improve the electrical reliability and the operation stability of the graphitizing furnace.

title: Desulfurizing device for raw materials of carbon products
abstract: The utility model discloses a desulfurizing device for raw materials of carbon products, which comprises a base, wherein a calcining desulfurization reaction furnace is arranged at the top of the base, an exhaust pipe is fixedly sleeved on the outer surface of the bottom end of the calcining desulfurization reaction furnace, a flue gas treatment assembly is arranged on the right side of the base, the flue gas treatment assembly comprises a reaction box and a baffle plate, a sleeve is fixedly sleeved on the inner wall of the middle part of the side surface of the reaction box, the side end of the sleeve is sleeved with the outer surface of the exhaust pipe, an air extractor is fixedly arranged at the top of the side end of the reaction box, which is far away from the sleeve, a plurality of baffle plates are arranged in parallel in the reaction box, a plurality of atomizing spray heads are fixedly arranged on the surfaces of the baffle plates, which are close to the sleeve, in the flue gas circulation process, and the baffle plates are arranged in parallel in the reaction box, so that the flue gas circulates in the middle, the detention reaction time of the flue gas in the reaction box is prolonged, the sulfur dioxide fully participates in the reaction, and the completeness of the discharged flue gas desulfurization treatment is increased.
context: Title: Desulfurizing device for raw materials of carbon products Abstract: The utility model discloses a desulfurizing device for raw materials of carbon products, which comprises a base, wherein a calcining desulfurization reaction furnace is arranged at the top of the base, an exhaust pipe is fixedly sleeved on the outer surface of the bottom end of the calcining desulfurization reaction furnace, a flue gas treatment assembly is arranged on the right side of the base, the flue gas treatment assembly comprises a reaction box and a baffle plate, a sleeve is fixedly sleeved on the inner wall of the middle part of the side surface of the reaction box, the side end of the sleeve is sleeved with the outer surface of the exhaust pipe, an air extractor is fixedly arranged at the top of the side end of the reaction box, which is far away from the sleeve, a plurality of baffle plates are arranged in parallel in the reaction box, a plurality of atomizing spray heads are fixedly arranged on the surfaces of the baffle plates, which are close to the sleeve, in the flue gas circulation process, and the baffle plates are arranged in parallel in the reaction box, so that the flue gas circulates in the middle, the detention reaction time of the flue gas in the reaction box is prolonged, the sulfur dioxide fully participates in the reaction, and the completeness of the discharged flue gas desulfurization treatment is increased.

title: High-efficient continuous smelting device of retrieving copper product
abstract: The utility model discloses a high-efficiency continuous smelting device for recovering copper materials, which comprises a smelting platform, wherein two vertical plates are welded at the upper part of the smelting platform, and a crushing box is welded between the two vertical plates. The waste copper material smelting device has the beneficial effects that the crushing box and the smelting furnace are arranged between the two vertical plates of the smelting platform, the two first motors for starting the crushing box respectively drive the corresponding shredding rollers to rotate, the plurality of shredding wheel pieces arranged on the surfaces of the two shredding rollers in a staggered manner are used for shredding the waste copper material with a larger size, then the waste copper material falls into the smelting furnace under the guiding effect of the trumpet-shaped discharging cover, the smoke cover connected with the discharging end of the discharging cover is adopted in combination, the suction type dredging of the smelting smoke is easy while the pre-crushing treatment of the waste copper material is met, and compared with the prior art, the waste copper material smelting device has the advantages that the erosion of the high-temperature smelting smoke to the crushing box is reduced by adopting the crushing box and the smelting furnace which are arranged in an up-down structure, and the waste copper material is favorable for high-efficiency and continuous smelting.

title: Alloy smelting device
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of nonferrous metal smelting, in particular to an alloy smelting device. The utility model provides an alloy smelting device which comprises a smelting furnace, a hollow stirring paddle, a continuous casting furnace, a movable piston and a guide rod, wherein the smelting furnace is connected with the continuous casting furnace, an air inlet and an air outlet are formed in the smelting furnace, the hollow stirring paddle is in dynamic sealing connection with the air inlet of the smelting furnace and extends into the smelting furnace, the movable piston is positioned in the continuous casting furnace and used for extruding melt in the continuous casting furnace, and the guide rod extends into the continuous casting furnace through a continuous casting opening of the continuous casting furnace. The alloy smelting device solves the problem that non-metal impurities such as oxygen, sulfur and the like are difficult to remove during alloy smelting, and can obtain high-purity and high-performance alloy products.
context: Title: Alloy smelting device Abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of nonferrous metal smelting, in particular to an alloy smelting device. title: Device for producing ferro-silicon aluminum by utilizing residual ferro-silicon liquid of magnesium smelting
abstract: The device for producing the ferrosilicon by utilizing the magnesium smelting residual ferrosilicon liquid comprises a feeding system, a vacuum alloying system, an iron discharging system and a siphon slag discharging system, wherein the feeding system is used for adding furnace materials into the vacuum alloying system, the vacuum alloying system is used for carrying out vacuum alloying treatment on the added furnace materials and the magnesium smelting residual ferrosilicon liquid in the vacuum alloying system to generate the ferrosilicon, the iron discharging system is used for treating the ferrosilicon generated by the vacuum alloying system to obtain the ferrosilicon, and the siphon slag discharging system is used for treating slag generated in the vacuum alloying system. The utility model can solve the problems of harm to the body, environmental pollution, low utilization and the like of the existing generation method.

title: Cracking carbon black reaction furnace capable of improving quality and efficiency
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of carbon black reaction furnaces, in particular to a cracking carbon black reaction furnace capable of improving quality and enhancing efficiency, which comprises a charging component, wherein the charging component comprises a raw material bin, a spiral push rod is sleeved on the lower surface of the raw material bin, the spiral push rod is fixedly connected with a pumping motor, the spiral push rod is fixedly connected with a first pipeline, the first pipeline is fixedly connected with a crushing bin, the surface of the crushing bin is fixedly connected with a second pipeline, the other end of the second pipeline is fixedly connected with a dust removing bin, the lower surface of the dust removing bin is fixedly connected with a third pipeline, the drying component comprises an extrusion bin, the lower surface of the extrusion bin is fixedly connected with a granulator, the lower surface of the granulator is fixedly connected with a roller dryer, and the other end of the roller dryer is fixedly connected with a filling component.
context: Title: Cracking carbon black reaction furnace capable of improving quality and efficiency Abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of carbon black reaction furnaces, in particular to a cracking carbon black reaction furnace capable of improving quality and enhancing efficiency, which comprises a charging component, wherein the charging component comprises a raw material bin, a spiral push rod is sleeved on the lower surface of the raw material bin, the spiral push rod is fixedly connected with a pumping motor, the spiral push rod is fixedly connected with a first pipeline, the first pipeline is fixedly connected with a crushing bin, the surface of the crushing bin is fixedly connected with a second pipeline, the other end of the second pipeline is fixedly connected with a dust removing bin, the lower surface of the dust removing bin is fixedly connected with a third pipeline, the drying component comprises an extrusion bin, the lower surface of the extrusion bin is fixedly connected with a granulator, the lower surface of the granulator is fixedly connected with a roller dryer, and the other end of the roller dryer is fixedly connected with a filling component.

title: Vertical continuous graphitizing furnace
abstract: The utility model provides a vertical continuous graphitizing furnace which comprises a high-temperature region furnace body and a heat preservation region furnace body which are sequentially arranged from top to bottom, and further comprises a cooling region furnace body and a cooling device, wherein the cooling region furnace body is connected with the lower surface of the heat preservation region furnace body, a furnace chamber of the cooling region furnace body is communicated with a furnace chamber of the heat preservation region furnace body, and a discharge hole of the graphitizing furnace is formed in the lower surface of the cooling region furnace body. The cooling device is provided with a cooling channel for flowing cooling medium, and the cooling channel is at least partially positioned in the furnace chamber of the cooling zone furnace body. The cooling area furnace body is arranged in the vertical continuous graphitizing furnace, so that materials enter the furnace chamber of the cooling area furnace body through the heat preservation area furnace body to be cooled, and the cooling channel of the cooling device extends into the furnace chamber of the cooling area furnace body, so that cooling medium of the cooling device can flow through the furnace chamber to cool the materials. At the same time, the cooling channel separates the material from the cooling medium to avoid harmful gas generation during the cooling process.

title: System for controlling equipment start-stop by weight in chicken manure air-drying equipment
abstract: The utility model discloses a system for controlling the start and stop of equipment by weight in chicken manure air-drying equipment, which relates to the technical field of chicken manure treatment, and comprises chicken manure air-drying equipment, wherein a weighing platform abutting against the lower surface of a conveying belt is arranged in the feeding part of the chicken manure air-drying equipment, two travel switches are arranged on the chicken manure air-drying equipment, the outside of the weighing platform is provided with a lever trigger mechanism for squeezing and triggering the travel switch, the two travel switches are respectively positioned at two sides of a fulcrum of the lever trigger mechanism, one side of the fulcrum of the lever trigger mechanism is provided with a connecting plate connected with the weighing platform, and the other side of the fulcrum of the lever trigger mechanism is provided with a weighing weight. The utility model can realize the purpose of controlling the high-pressure fan to start and stop automatically according to the feeding amount, so that the power consumption of the air drying equipment can be reduced to a certain extent, the waste of power resources and the increase of the burden of a user are avoided, and the purpose of adjusting the set value of the automatic start and stop can also be realized, so that the user can adjust to a certain extent according to the actual use requirement.

title: Antiscaling type air energy water heater
abstract: The utility model discloses an anti-scale air energy water heater, which comprises an air energy water heater host and an anti-scale device, wherein the anti-scale device is arranged, namely an inner filter plate can realize filtering and purifying activities on cold water which enters, so that the formation quantity of scale is reduced, the inside cleanliness of an inner container is ensured, meanwhile, when the cold water enters a shell, a fan blade arranged at the outer end of an impact rotating shaft is used for enabling the fan blade to realize self-rotation activities of a first scraper blade and a second scraper blade, the first scraper blade and the second scraper blade can respectively realize scraping cleaning of the side edge of the filter plate and the inner wall of the shell, so that the cleanliness of the filter plate and the shell is ensured, and a quick lock assembly is arranged, namely a press block arranged in the two sides of the shell is synchronously extruded, so that the press block can push out a lock shaft inserted in a lock hole through a press shaft arranged in the middle part, thereby being capable of quickly unlocking the inner part of the shell, ensuring that the whole filter plate can be quickly moved out, and the filter plate is conveniently disassembled and cleaned without excessively complicated disassembling steps.

title: Waste water heat energy utilization economizer
abstract: The utility model discloses an energy-saving device for waste water heat energy utilization, which comprises a storage device and a heat exchange device, wherein the storage device comprises a waste water storage tank and a water suction pump, the interior of the waste water storage tank is used for storing low-temperature waste water, a water inlet, a first water outlet and a second water outlet are formed in the waste water storage tank, the first water outlet is connected with a waste water evaporation feeding groove, the water suction pump is arranged at the first water outlet and the second water outlet, the heat exchange device comprises a steam-water separator, a first heat exchanger and a second heat exchanger, an air inlet end of the first heat exchanger is connected with a hot steam source, an air outlet end of the first heat exchanger is communicated with the steam-water separator, and a water inlet end of the first heat exchanger is connected with the second water outlet through the water suction pump, and an air outlet end of the first heat exchanger is connected with the water inlet.

title: Healthy environment-friendly ultrasonic humidifier
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of ultrasonic humidifiers, in particular to a healthy and environment-friendly ultrasonic humidifier. Including humidifier body, purple light lighting fixture and atomizer, one side surface of humidifier body is provided with control panel, two fog pipes are installed to upper surface one side of humidifier body, the mounting panel is installed to the lateral wall of humidifier body, the inside of humidifier body is provided with the water tank, the water tank lateral wall corresponds the being provided with water inlet and outlet of mounting panel, the purple light lighting fixture is located the upper end of water tank, the atomizer is installed in inner wall one side of water tank, the atomizer is located under the fog pipe, the inner wall surface of water tank is equipped with filtering mechanism, filtering mechanism includes four cardboard and filter block. The healthy and environment-friendly ultrasonic humidifier provided by the utility model has the advantages of convenience in filtering water in a water tank in the humidifier, health and environment friendliness.

title: Flue gas heating device for wet flue gas desulfurization
abstract: The application provides a flue gas heating device for wet flue gas desulfurization, and relates to the field of flue gas desulfurization. Including body, heating component, filter tube and sewage treatment component, the heating component is located the inside of body, the heating component includes heat pipe and electric heating box, heat pipe and electric heating box all are located the inside of body, the heat pipe is used for carrying out quick heat conduction to the flue gas of carrying, electric heating box is used for promoting the inside temperature of body. This flue gas heating device for flue gas desulfurization dispels damp can promote the inside temperature of body before the flue gas gets into the body through heat pipe and electric heating case for the flue gas enters into the inside back of body, can receive the change of temperature to heat fast, so that follow-up quick processing, through sewage treatment component, can carry out effective stirring filtration to the impurity that gets into after the liquefaction in the processing case, makes the impurity in the water can be poured into by the neutralization liquid and is got rid of effectively after stirring.

title: Distribution station for producing fusidic acid by fermentation method
abstract: The utility model discloses a distribution station for producing fusidic acid by using a fermentation method, which relates to the technical field of fermentation engineering and comprises a steam pipeline connected with a steam source, a distribution main pipe for supplying steam and a sewage pipeline connected with a wastewater treatment system, wherein the distribution main pipe is provided with a plurality of branch pipes, the branch pipes are provided with seed shifting valves, and the branch pipes are connected with the seed shifting pipeline through the seed shifting valves; the exhaust valve is integrally connected with the flow control valve, the inner wall of the seed transfer pipeline is smooth and has no dead angle, the dead angle is easy to collect dirt and reproduce microorganisms in a fermentation environment, the integral design of the seed transfer valve and the internal design of the seed transfer pipeline which is smooth and has no dead angle enable the whole connecting part to be smoother and more continuous, no gaps, pits and other places easy to retain impurities are left, the cleaning and the disinfection are convenient, the sanitary condition of the environment where gas and materials are located in the exhaust and seed transfer process is ensured, and the risk of adverse effects on the quality of fermentation products is reduced.

title: Rare earth solid-state hydrogen storage reactor based on differential pressure driving
abstract: The utility model discloses a rare earth solid hydrogen storage reactor based on differential pressure driving, which comprises a hydrogen storage reactor shell, heat-conducting pipes, a central air pipe and an end cover, wherein the top and the bottom of the hydrogen storage reactor shell are respectively sealed by the end cover, a reactor filter screen is fixedly arranged in the hydrogen storage reactor shell, the reactor filter screen divides the interior of the hydrogen storage reactor shell into an annular low-pressure area on the outer side and a packing area on the inner side, the center of the packing area is fixedly provided with a central air pipe extending to the outside of the upper end cover on the top of the hydrogen storage reactor shell from the bottom of the hydrogen storage reactor shell, and a plurality of heat-conducting pipes are fixedly arranged in an annular arrangement manner in the packing area surrounding the outside of the central air pipe. The utility model utilizes the pressure difference to drive the hydrogen to flow outwards from the central air pipe, thereby avoiding the problem that local hydrogen cannot flow due to hardening of the hydrogen storage material after pulverization in the hydrogen absorption process, and the heat-conducting pipe and the outside hydrogen can cool the filling area at the same time, thereby improving the reaction rate of hydrogen absorption.

title: Self-circulation ultrapure water equipment
abstract: The utility model discloses self-circulation ultra-pure water equipment, which belongs to the technical field of ultra-pure water equipment and comprises an ultra-pure water machine body, a control panel, a shutoff valve and a heat radiation window, wherein the control panel and the shutoff valve are arranged on the surface of the ultra-pure water machine body, the heat radiation window is arranged on the outer wall of the ultra-pure water machine body, a clamping assembly is arranged above the ultra-pure water machine body, the clamping assembly comprises a top plate arranged above the ultra-pure water machine body, a screw rod spirally inserted on the surface of the top plate, a pressing plate fixedly connected with the inserting end of the screw rod, a guide rod fixedly connected with the surface of the top plate, and a limiting seat fixedly connected with the tail end of the guide rod. The ultra-pure water machine body is directly placed on the counter surface for use, the top plate can also be hung on the surface of the rack according to the structural layout of a laboratory, the screw is screwed on the opposite top plate, and the hanging installation of the ultra-pure water machine body is completed under the clamping and limiting effects of the pressure plate and the reinforcing plate of the ultra-pure water machine body, so that the space is saved, and the ultra-pure water machine is convenient to use.

title: Expansion buffer device of platinum channel and platinum pipe section
abstract: The utility model provides an expansion buffer device of a platinum channel and a platinum pipe section, wherein the device can be arranged on two platinum pipes to be connected, the device comprises a buffer part and a connecting flange group, the connecting flange group is arranged between the two platinum pipes to be connected, the buffer part is arranged on at least one platinum pipe to be connected and is positioned between a first pipe section and a second pipe section of the platinum pipe to be connected, the buffer part is of an annular structure, a buffer surface is formed on the annular edge of the annular structure, and the buffer surface extends outwards along the side surface of the platinum pipe to be connected to form an arc-shaped bulge loop. Through the design of the buffer part in the device body, the annular structure and the arc-shaped bulge loop of the device body can effectively absorb the expansion force generated by expansion and contraction of the platinum tube in the heating process, so that the platinum tube has a certain stretching and compressing space in expansion, and stress concentration and damage caused by direct rigid connection are avoided. The reliability and the efficiency of the expansion of the platinum channel are improved, and the method has good practical significance.

title: Salt valve for salt box
abstract: The utility model discloses a salt valve for a salt box, which comprises a vertical rod, wherein one side of the vertical rod is provided with a connecting rod, an adjusting mechanism is arranged between the vertical rod and the connecting rod, the adjusting mechanism comprises a first connecting plate, a second connecting plate, a first folding pipe, a second folding pipe, a guide hole, a guide plate, a first groove, a slot, a plugboard, a second groove and a cylinder, the second connecting plate is positioned at the lower ends of the vertical rod and the outer wall of the connecting rod, the first connecting plate is positioned at the upper ends of the vertical rod and the outer wall of the connecting rod, the first folding pipe is positioned at the middle part of the vertical rod, and the second folding pipe is positioned at the middle part of the connecting rod. According to the salt valve for the salt box, the first folding pipe and the second folding pipe can be conveniently stretched according to the needs, the salt boxes with different heights are conveniently adjusted to be used in a height-adaptive mode, the adaptability is improved, the guide plates can be limited and fixed, the length of the salt valve after adjustment is fixed, and the salt valve has a better application prospect.

title: Manual clutch and annealing kiln
abstract: The utility model discloses a manual clutch and an annealing kiln, wherein the manual clutch comprises a fixed part, a driving part, a fixed clutch, a sliding clutch and a driving part, wherein the driving part is connected with the fixed part in a mode of sliding along a first direction, the fixed clutch synchronously rotates with a first main shaft, the sliding clutch is connected with a second main shaft in a mode of sliding along the first direction and synchronously rotates with the second main shaft, the driving part is connected with the driving part so as to switch the manual clutch between a first state and a second state, the fixed clutch is connected with the sliding clutch in the first state so as to realize that the first main shaft drives the second main shaft to synchronously rotate or the second main shaft drives the first main shaft to synchronously rotate, and the fixed clutch and the sliding clutch are arranged at intervals along the first direction in the second state. According to the utility model, the main shaft which stops rotating can be connected with the adjacent main shaft which normally rotates through the manual clutch, and the main shaft which stops rotating is driven to restart and restore the normal rotating state by means of the rotating power of the main shaft which normally rotates.

title: Device for preventing condensation backwater at air outlet of oxygen pumping fan
abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of PEM (PEM) electrolyzed water hydrogen production, and particularly relates to a device for preventing condensation and backwater at an air outlet of an oxygen pumping fan, which comprises a double-pipe heat exchanger, a heat exchanger and a heat exchanger, wherein the double-pipe heat exchanger comprises an inner pipe communicated with the air outlet of the oxygen pumping fan and an outer pipe spirally sleeved on the outer wall of the inner pipe and used for passing through a cooling medium; and the automatic drainage device is communicated with the bottom of the inner pipe and is used for collecting and draining condensed water flowing down in the inner pipe. The utility model avoids the risk of equipment damage caused by the moisture-rich oxygen and the condensation reverse flow fan under the high temperature condition in the working of the oxygen-extracting fan under the low temperature environment, improves the safety of the system, has simple structure, is convenient to install, reduces the equipment cost and the maintenance difficulty, is suitable for differential pressure PEM water electrolysis hydrogen production systems with different standard parties, and has wide application prospect.

title: Be used for quick watering maintenance device after concrete placement
abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of concrete curing devices, in particular to a rapid sprinkling curing device used after concrete pouring, which comprises a workbench, wherein a power mechanism and an anti-tilting mechanism are respectively arranged below the workbench; the anti-tilting mechanism is positioned at two sides of the power mechanism and comprises a rubber wheel, the anti-tilting mechanism is used for avoiding tilting of the device driven by the rubber wheel, the power mechanism comprises a driving motor, and the power mechanism is used for providing power for the device by the driving motor. This with quick watering maintenance device after concrete placement is put in, through setting up driving motor and driving the rubber wheel at first connecting axle both ends through the epaxial fourth gear engagement transmission of third gear and first connecting, drive device marching fast and carry out watering maintenance, solved current maintenance and adopted artifical watering maintenance, comparatively extravagant water, the longer technical problem of time moreover.

title: Nano silicon crystal insulation board with built-in single-layer steel wire mesh
abstract: The utility model discloses a nano-silicon crystal insulation board with a built-in single-layer steel wire mesh, belongs to the technical field of building insulation, and aims to overcome the defects of low bending load, bending strength and bonding strength of the conventional nano-silicon crystal insulation board with the single-layer steel wire mesh. The nano silicon crystal heat-insulating plate comprises a low heat conduction type heat-insulating layer and a bonding type heat-insulating layer, wherein a single-layer steel wire mesh is arranged in the low heat conduction type heat-insulating layer, the bonding type heat-insulating layer comprises an upper bonding type heat-insulating layer and a lower bonding type heat-insulating layer, and the low heat conduction type heat-insulating layer and the two bonding type heat-insulating layers are integrally molded in a compression mode. The bending load, the bending strength and the bonding strength of the nano silicon crystal insulation board are improved by utilizing the characteristics of high tensile strength and high compressive strength of the two bonding type insulation layers, and the insulation board is ensured to have better insulation performance by utilizing the characteristics of low heat conductivity of the low heat conductivity type insulation layers.

title: Curved flow type underground water system repairing and maintaining device convenient to maintain
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of underground water system restoration and maintenance, and discloses a curved flow type underground water system restoration and maintenance device convenient to maintain, which comprises a soil layer and an underground water layer, wherein a pumping well and a drainage well are respectively arranged at two sides of the interior of the soil layer, a water collecting component for collecting underground water is arranged in an inner cavity of the pumping well, a lower seepage plate for accelerating seepage is arranged in the inner cavity of the drainage well, the water collecting component comprises an extrusion screen arranged on the inner wall of the pumping well, a filter screen is arranged in the inner cavity of the extrusion screen, a water collecting tank is arranged between the extrusion screen and the filter screen, surrounding soil is extruded through the extrusion screen, so that the underground water permeates out, the condition that the soil and the underground water are mixed together to be extracted is avoided, the condition that a pipeline is blocked by the soil is reduced is avoided, the extracted underground water enters a mixing device after being processed by a sewage treatment device, is mixed with an oxidant or a reducing agent, and is discharged into the soil after being mixed, and the pollution degree of the underground water is reduced.
context: Title: Curved flow type underground water system repairing and maintaining device convenient to maintain Abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of underground water system restoration and maintenance, and discloses a curved flow type underground water system restoration and maintenance device convenient to maintain, which comprises a soil layer and an underground water layer, wherein a pumping well and a drainage well are respectively arranged at two sides of the interior of the soil layer, a water collecting component for collecting underground water is arranged in an inner cavity of the pumping well, a lower seepage plate for accelerating seepage is arranged in the inner cavity of the drainage well, the water collecting component comprises an extrusion screen arranged on the inner wall of the pumping well, a filter screen is arranged in the inner cavity of the extrusion screen, a water collecting tank is arranged between the extrusion screen and the filter screen, surrounding soil is extruded through the extrusion screen, so that the underground water permeates out, the condition that the soil and the underground water are mixed together to be extracted is avoided, the condition that a pipeline is blocked by the soil is reduced is avoided, the extracted underground water enters a mixing device after being processed by a sewage treatment device, is mixed with an oxidant or a reducing agent, and is discharged into the soil after being mixed, and the pollution degree of the underground water is reduced.

title: T-shaped rubber composite material for expansion joint protection
abstract: The T-shaped rubber composite material for protecting the expansion joint comprises T-shaped rubber which is matched with the expansion joint in size, ceramic particles are embedded into the top surface of the rubber, grid cloth and epoxy structural rubber are sequentially arranged on the bottom surface of a wing plate of the rubber, a hollow structure is arranged in the middle of the rubber, and a barb structure is arranged outside a T-shaped protruding portion of the rubber. The utility model bonds the rubber plate on the expansion joint surface through the barb structure arranged on the T-shaped rubber and the epoxy structural adhesive smeared on the T-shaped rubber wing plate, can reduce or avoid falling off under the severe working conditions such as high-speed water flow, bed load impact and the like, and ensures that the surface of the rubber composite material has high anti-scouring impact resistance and excellent energy dissipation buffer effect in a hot vulcanization mode after the unvulcanized rubber extrudes ceramic particles for molding, thereby having the anti-scouring performance equivalent to that of the runner anti-scouring coating as an expansion joint backfill material and being difficult to damage at the part.

title: Rural non-point source pollution interception and buffer system at hardened river bank side
abstract: The utility model relates to a rural surface source pollution interception and buffering system on a hardened river bank side, which comprises a buffering runner arranged between a river and the hardened river bank, wherein the buffering runner is parallel to the river, the buffering runner is separated from the river by a vertical baffle wall, an upper communication port communicated with the river is arranged at the upstream end of the buffering runner, a lower communication port communicated with the river is arranged at the downstream end of the buffering runner, a filtering mechanism and a water inlet regulating mechanism are arranged in the upper communication port, a lower permeable filtering dam is arranged in the lower communication port, a plurality of aquatic plant purifying components are arranged in the buffering runner, plants are planted on the surface layer of the aquatic plant purifying components, and vine plants are arranged on one side of the buffering runner, facing the hardened river bank. In the utility model, the sewage which causes river surface source pollution is treated and then discharged into the river, so that the river can be prevented from being polluted.

title: Riverway shore buffer zone with flood control and ecological purification functions
abstract: The utility model discloses a riverway shore buffer zone with flood control and ecological purification, which belongs to the technical field of shore buffer zones and comprises a shore wall foundation arranged along the trend of a riverway shore slope and a combined ecological lattice shore wall fixedly connected to the shore wall foundation, wherein the combined ecological lattice shore wall is formed by longitudinally stacking multiple layers of ecological lattice monomers, the ecological lattice monomers are connected in the transverse direction by adopting fixed connecting pieces, expansion joints are arranged between two adjacent ecological lattice monomers on the same horizontal plane, filtering filler is filled in each ecological lattice monomer, and aquatic plants are planted in the ecological lattice monomers at the top layer. The utility model not only can ensure the safety of river flood in hilly areas, but also can play roles in protecting water quality, intercepting runoff pollutants, controlling river bank erosion and maintaining biological habitat.

title: Movable anti-collision guardrail concrete atomization spraying maintenance device
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of guardrail spray curing, in particular to a movable type anti-collision guardrail concrete atomization spray curing device. The device comprises a spraying main pipe and spraying branch pipes symmetrically arranged on two sides of the spraying main pipe, wherein the spraying main pipe is detachably connected to a supporting plate, the supporting plate is fixedly connected to a mounting plate, a clamping arm which slides relatively is arranged on the mounting plate, the lower end of the clamping arm is hinged to a clamping plate, and a driving assembly which is used for driving the clamping arm to slide relatively is arranged on the mounting plate. The device can be adjusted according to the width of the concrete railing, so that the device can be erected on the concrete railing with different widths, all parts of the device can be detached and separated, replacement, classified storage and transportation of all parts are facilitated, and the device can be moved on the railing and can be slid to a next curing area conveniently.

title: Double-beam cutting and tailoring equipment
abstract: The utility model relates to a double-beam cutting and tailoring device, which comprises a frame, at least one beam device, a negative pressure box device and a supporting platform device. The negative pressure box device comprises a negative pressure box body and a negative pressure generating assembly, wherein the negative pressure box body comprises a negative pressure space and a processing opening positioned at an opening of the negative pressure space. The support platform device comprises a plurality of rows of support mechanisms, negative pressure gaps are formed between two adjacent rows of support mechanisms, the support mechanisms are distributed along the length direction, a plurality of groups of support beams are flush at the tail ends of the support beams, each group of support beams comprises a plurality of elastic wires, and at least part of support beams of the support mechanisms are distributed in a processing opening of the negative pressure box device. The beam device comprises a cutting mechanism, and at least part of the supporting mechanism is positioned in the telescopic cutting movable range of the cutting mechanism. The cutting mechanism can not damage the supporting mechanism even if penetrating into the supporting beam when cutting materials, thereby prolonging the service life of the supporting framework.

title: Calcium sulfate whisker crystallization device
abstract: The utility model is suitable for the technical field of materials, and provides a calcium sulfate whisker crystallization device which comprises a crystallization box, a heating plate fixedly arranged at the bottom of the crystallization box, a positioning plate, a supporting plate, a stirring rod, a spraying pipe, a stirring rod and a stirring rod, wherein the positioning plate is arranged at the top of the crystallization box in an array mode, the supporting plate is fixedly arranged at the top of the positioning plate, the stirring rod is fixedly arranged in the middle of the positioning plate and extends into the crystallization box. Compared with the prior art, the stirring rod has the beneficial effects that when in use, the spraying pipe is arranged at the top end of the surface of the stirring rod and is communicated with the reactant conveying structure, so that the spraying work of the calcium sulfate dihydrate can be further carried out from a high place, the situation that the spraying pipe is soaked in an acid solution to cause internal crystallization is avoided, and the stirring rod is arranged, so that the mixture can be rotationally sprayed and stirred, and the crystallization speed is accelerated.

title: Single crystal furnace filter tank cleaning device and single crystal furnace
abstract: The utility model provides a cleaning device for a filtering tank of a single crystal furnace and the single crystal furnace, and relates to the technical field of single crystal silicon production. The cleaning device for the single crystal furnace filter tank comprises an air gun, a telescopic pipe, an impeller and a flexible cleaning piece, wherein the first end of the telescopic pipe is connected with an air outlet of the air gun, air flow sprayed out of the air outlet of the air gun is sprayed out of the second end of the telescopic pipe through the telescopic pipe, the impeller is rotatably arranged at the second end of the telescopic pipe and is configured to rotate under the impact of air flow sprayed out of the second end of the telescopic pipe, the flexible cleaning piece is connected to the periphery of the impeller, and the flexible cleaning piece is configured to swing under the driving of the impeller so as to clean a filter bag of the filter tank. The utility model provides a cleaning device for a filtering tank of a single crystal furnace and the single crystal furnace, and the cleaning effect is good.

title: Feeder of single crystal furnace
abstract: The utility model discloses a single crystal furnace feeder which comprises a quartz cylinder with two open ends, a first tetrafluoro sleeve and a second tetrafluoro sleeve, wherein the first tetrafluoro sleeve is arranged at the upper end of the quartz cylinder and comprises a first flange and a first connecting sleeve body, the second tetrafluoro sleeve is used for being connected with a tetrafluoro limiting disc and is arranged in the middle of the quartz cylinder and comprises a second flange and a second connecting sleeve body, the first connecting sleeve body and the second connecting sleeve body are fixedly sleeved with the quartz cylinder, and the first tetrafluoro sleeve and the second tetrafluoro sleeve are of a polytetrafluoroethylene sleeve structure. The feeder of the single crystal furnace reduces the damage to the flange caused by collision in the using process of the feeder, prolongs the service life of the feeder and reduces the production cost of the quartz cylinder.

title: Simple substance arsenic sublimation furnace charging equipment
abstract: The utility model discloses a single-substance arsenic sublimating furnace charging device, which belongs to the field of sublimating furnace charging devices and comprises a charging mechanism, a charging device, a sublimating furnace, a furnace cover and an exhaust pipe, wherein the charging mechanism consists of a shield rail, a protective cover, an exhaust hole, a furnace placing groove and a tail plate, the charging device consists of a charging rail, an electric control movable seat, a connecting pipe, an electric control valve, a supporting frame, a top plate, a bin cover, a bin and a screw conveyor, the sublimating furnace is placed in the furnace placing groove in batches, cooling, charging and placing in idle of the sublimating furnace are performed through the furnace placing groove, and the charging device and the protective cover which can be moved in an electric control manner are arranged, so that the device can charge conveniently and rapidly only by manually abutting the connecting pipe of the charging device and the sublimating furnace, the operation is simple and convenient, the contact of workers can be reduced, and the sublimating furnace which is cooled, charged and idle can be protected in time through the protective cover when being assembled and disassembled, and the harm of harmful substances to the workers can be reduced.

title: Heating device and epitaxial equipment
abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of semiconductor processing equipment, and discloses a heating device and epitaxial equipment, wherein the heating device comprises at least two heating bodies, at least two outwards-protruding bosses are arranged on each heating body, each heating body is correspondingly provided with two first connecting bodies, one end face of each first connecting body is provided with a first bearing groove, the other end of each first connecting body is connected with an electrode, one boss on each heating body can be embedded in one first bearing groove, the other boss can be embedded in the other first bearing groove, different heating bodies can be distributed at intervals in the height direction through the two first connecting bodies corresponding to each heating body, the epitaxial equipment comprises a reaction cavity and the heating device, the heating device is arranged in the reaction cavity, the bosses can be stably connected with the first connecting bodies, the temperature control effect is better, and the service life is long.

title: N-type 4H silicon carbide single crystal growth equipment
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of silicon carbide single crystal growth, in particular to n-type 4H silicon carbide single crystal growth equipment, which comprises an equipment frame platform, an operation platform, a power supply system, a control system, a lifting machine assembly and a vacuum cavity assembly, wherein the operation platform, the power supply system and the control system are all arranged on one side of the equipment frame platform, the vacuum cavity assembly is arranged on the equipment frame platform, the lifting machine assembly is arranged on the equipment frame platform corresponding to the vacuum cavity assembly, the power supply system and the control system are electrically connected with the vacuum cavity assembly, the n-type 4H silicon carbide single crystal growth equipment further comprises an air path panel assembly, a circulating cooling water supply system, a vacuum detection device and a temperature field lifting rotation assembly, and the vacuum cavity assembly comprises a vacuum chamber, a vacuum furnace cover, a low vacuum pumping device, a high vacuum pumping device, an infrared thermometer and a deflation valve. The utility model can continuously increase the wafer size of the silicon carbide single crystal material and reduce the defect density.

title: Silicon carbide crystal growth crucible and device
abstract: The utility model discloses a silicon carbide crystal growth crucible and a device, which belong to the technical field of semiconductor materials, wherein the crucible is provided with a crucible cover, a crucible wall, a crucible bottom and a cavity formed by surrounding the crucible wall and the crucible bottom, the crucible cover covers the cavity, one side of the crucible cover in the cavity is provided with a seed crystal bonding position, the cavity comprises a growth cavity and a raw material cavity which are mutually communicated, the raw material cavity is internally provided with a first porous tubular part and a second porous tubular part which extend from the crucible bottom to the top of the cavity, the first porous tubular part comprises a first cylinder wall and a middle cylinder which is communicated with the growth cavity, the second porous tubular part is arranged between the first porous tubular part and the crucible wall, the problem of carbon coating can be effectively improved, a large amount of polycrystalline deposition in the growth cavity can be effectively avoided, the problem of crystallization of silicon carbide can be effectively improved, and the utilization rate of raw materials can be improved.

title: Clamping mechanism for silicon core growth and silicon core growth equipment
abstract: The application provides a clamping mechanism for silicon core growth and silicon core growth equipment, and relates to the technical field of silicon core production. The clamping mechanism comprises a supporting base body, a transmission shaft, a driving piece, a plurality of first rotating pieces, a plurality of groups of second rotating pieces and a seed crystal chuck, wherein the transmission shaft is rotatably supported on the supporting base body, the driving piece is in transmission connection with the transmission shaft and used for driving the transmission shaft to rotate, the first rotating pieces are coaxially connected with the transmission shaft, outer teeth are arranged on the periphery of the first rotating pieces and are arranged in a staggered mode in the radial direction of the transmission shaft, each first rotating piece is correspondingly provided with a group of second rotating pieces, each group of second rotating pieces is provided with a plurality of second rotating pieces, outer teeth are arranged on the periphery of each second rotating piece, the second rotating pieces are rotatably supported on the supporting base body and can be meshed and matched with the first rotating pieces, and each second rotating piece is connected with the seed crystal chuck and used for clamping a silicon core. The silicon core drawing device can draw a plurality of silicon cores at one time, and the efficiency is greatly improved.

title: Single crystal furnace
abstract: The utility model discloses a single crystal furnace, and belongs to the technical field of single crystal silicon preparation. The single crystal furnace comprises a furnace body, a lifting system, a large crucible and a plurality of small crucibles, wherein the lifting system is arranged in a secondary chamber of the furnace body, the lifting system comprises a plurality of seed crystal connecting pieces, each seed crystal connecting piece is used for connecting one seed crystal, a through hole is formed in the bottom of each small crucible, the small crucibles are positioned and nested in the large crucible and are communicated with the large crucible through the through holes, the central shaft of each small crucible corresponds to one seed crystal connecting piece, the seed crystals connected by the seed crystal connecting pieces are overlapped with the central shaft of the small crucible, and the lifting system and the large crucible are coaxial and rotate in the same direction. The single crystal furnace can solve the problem of large temperature difference of the liquid level of silicon, can block convection generated by rotation of a large crucible, and can improve the quality of a silicon rod while improving the production efficiency of the silicon rod.

title: Single crystal weighing device of crystal furnace
abstract: The utility model discloses a single crystal weighing device of a crystal furnace, which is used for measuring the weight of crystal growth change in a weighing chamber during seed rod seeding. The weighing assembly is positioned above the motor assembly, is detachably connected with the weighing chamber and is used for measuring the weight of crystals in the working process of the motor assembly. The support component is arranged in the weighing chamber, is positioned between the motor component and the weighing component, and is respectively connected with the motor component and the weighing component in a detachable mode. The supporting component supports the motor component and the weighing component, the motor component works to drive the seed rod to rotate, the seed crystal located at the tail of the seed rod starts seeding, and along with crystal growth, the weighing component senses the change of the weight of the crystal above the motor component, so that the crystal can be controlled to keep fixed diameter growth through the change of the weight of the crystal.

title: Visual drop method halide crystal growing device
abstract: The utility model relates to a visual descent method halide crystal growth device, which is characterized in that an upper heating area is arranged above the visual descent method halide crystal growth device, a gradient area is arranged below the upper heating area along the central axis direction, a lower heating area is arranged below the gradient area along the central axis direction, a crucible is arranged in the middle of the upper heating area, crystals grow up and down in a cavity formed by the upper heating area, the gradient area and the lower heating area, the time cost and the waste of material energy sources in the low-temperature halide crystal growth process can be greatly saved, and the problem that the conventional descent method halide crystal growth device cannot observe the crystal growth condition in real time is solved. The method has the advantages of avoiding the waste of material energy sources, avoiding or reducing the technical problems of time and waste of material energy sources due to early discovery and early intervention of crystal growth because polycrystal and even cracking are easy to occur due to the influence of contact between a crucible and the crystal in the crystal growth process of a descent method.

title: Crystal oven with adjustable temperature
abstract: The utility model discloses a temperature-adjustable crystal furnace, which belongs to the technical field of crystal production and comprises a furnace body, wherein a heating furnace tube is arranged in the furnace body, and a crucible is arranged in the heating furnace tube; according to the utility model, the first heating power supply and the second heating power supply are arranged, the first heating power supply is used for supplying power to the upper-section resistance wire, the first temperature controller is matched with the first thermocouple to monitor and regulate the temperature of the upper-section resistance wire, the second heating power supply is used for supplying power to the lower-section resistance wire, the lower-section resistance wire is used for heating the lower-section part of the heating furnace tube, the second temperature controller and the second thermocouple are used for monitoring and regulating the temperature of the lower-section resistance wire, the defect that the temperature gradient cannot be accurately controlled in the crystal growth process can be effectively solved by arranging the double-temperature zone, and the heating mode of the scheme can be used for quickly and accurately regulating and controlling the temperature gradient in the crystal growth furnace, so that more beneficial support is provided for the crystal growth process.
context: Title: Crystal oven with adjustable temperature Abstract: The utility model discloses a temperature-adjustable crystal furnace, which belongs to the technical field of crystal production and comprises a furnace body, wherein a heating furnace tube is arranged in the furnace body, and a crucible is arranged in the heating furnace tube; according to the utility model, the first heating power supply and the second heating power supply are arranged, the first heating power supply is used for supplying power to the upper-section resistance wire, the first temperature controller is matched with the first thermocouple to monitor and regulate the temperature of the upper-section resistance wire, the second heating power supply is used for supplying power to the lower-section resistance wire, the lower-section resistance wire is used for heating the lower-section part of the heating furnace tube, the second temperature controller and the second thermocouple are used for monitoring and regulating the temperature of the lower-section resistance wire, the defect that the temperature gradient cannot be accurately controlled in the crystal growth process can be effectively solved by arranging the double-temperature zone, and the heating mode of the scheme can be used for quickly and accurately regulating and controlling the temperature gradient in the crystal growth furnace, so that more beneficial support is provided for the crystal growth process.

title: Device for growing tellurium cadmium compound crystal
abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of crystal growth, and particularly relates to a device for growing tellurium-cadmium compound crystals. The device for growing the tellurium-cadmium compound crystal mainly comprises a growth container, a cooling device and a lifting table, wherein the growth container is placed on the lifting table, the lifting table drives the growth container to move up and down, the top of the growth container is recessed downwards, the cooling device is placed in a recessed area of the top of the growth container, and the cooling device is electrified to cool the top of the growth container, so that liquid tellurium is deposited on the top of the growth container after the tellurium-cadmium compound crystal grows. The device for growing the tellurium cadmium compound crystal can grow the tellurium cadmium compound crystal by using the tellurium-rich method, the surface of the obtained crystal is smooth and has no crack, the cracking of the tellurium cadmium compound crystal is reduced, the tellurium material with high purity is recovered for the next use, the resources are saved, and meanwhile, the cooling device can continuously work without any refrigerant, and the high-precision temperature control is realized.

title: Process and system for converting solid municipal waste by depolymerisation and transient multi-step reactions
abstract: The invention relates to a method and system for treating and recovering municipal waste, by means of steps of pre-treatment, degassing, depolymerisation and/or pyrogasification. The process allows synthesis gas, oil and charcoal or biochar to be obtained, which are cooled, cleaned and reused as fuels in the same system. If chlorine compounds are detected, a preliminary degasification step is activated to remove pollutants. The system comprises specific degasification devices with thermal and oxygen control, as well as a reactor that allows multiple passes of the material to ensure the complete processing thereof. Also included is a circuit for collection and separation of liquid, solid and gas products, maximising energy efficiency and the recovery of recoverable by-products. The plant can process different types of waste, including slurry, and is designed to operate safely, autonomously and sustainably.

title: Valve opener, filter cartridge and filter device
abstract: The invention relates to a valve opener (4) for opening a valve (3.4) of an inlet funnel (3) for a filter device (1), wherein the valve opener (4) can be inserted into a receiving chamber (3.2) of the inlet funnel (3) along an assembly direction (100), wherein the receiving chamber (3.2) is designed to receive a filter cartridge (2), in particular according to one of the preceding claims, and has a base (2.5) in which the valve (3.4), which can be actuated between a closed position and an open position, is arranged, wherein the valve opener (4) has a funnel contact surface (4.3) which is in contact with the inlet funnel (3) when the valve opener (4) is arranged in the receiving chamber (3.2), wherein the valve opener (4) has a filter contact surface (4.4) which is in contact with the filter cartridge (2) when the filter cartridge (2) is arranged in the receiving chamber (3.2), wherein the valve opener (4) has a receiving opening (4.1) into which a valve body (3.5) of the valve (3.4) at least partially protrudes when the valve opener (4) is arranged in the receiving chamber (3.2), wherein an edge of the receiving opening (4.1) comprises a valve lifter (4.2) which enters into a frictional and/or form-fitting connection with the valve body (3.5) when the valve body (3.5) protrudes into the receiving opening (4.1), and wherein the valve opener (4) has a restoring means (4.5) which exerts a restoring force on the valve lifter (4.2) in order to transfer the valve body (3.5) into the open position after the frictional and/or form-fitting connection has been established, wherein the valve opener (4) is designed in such a way that the valve lifter (4.2) is arranged between the filter contact surface (4.4) and the funnel contact surface (4.3) along the assembly direction (100).

title: Filter cartridge, system and filter device
abstract: The invention relates to a filter cartridge (2) for an inlet funnel (3) of a filter device (1), wherein the filter cartridge (2) has a filter chamber (2.1) in which a filter medium (2.2) for filtering a liquid is arranged, wherein the filter device (1) has at least one inlet opening (2.3) through which the liquid to be filtered enters the filter chamber (2.1), and wherein the filter cartridge (2) has, in the region of its base (2.5), at least one outlet opening (2.4) through which the filtered liquid leaves the filter chamber (2.1), wherein the base (2.5) of the filter cartridge (2.1) is flat or has a funnel-shaped taper (2.6). The invention further relates to a novel valve opener (4) for opening a valve (3.4) of an inlet funnel (3) for a filter device (1), and to a filter device (1).

title: Method for performing pulsed electric arc discharges under vacuum conditions
abstract: In the method for carrying out pulsed electric arc discharges under vacuum conditions, at least one electric arc discharge is initiated between a cathode and an anode in that a laser beam is directed from a laser radiation source onto a surface of the cathode in order to form a starting plasma, and then, after formation of a starting plasma, by means of an electric voltage with an electric current, which is applied to the cathode and the anode, which in turn are arranged at a distance from one another, an electric arc discharge is ignited between the cathode and anode, wherein the igniting of the electric arc discharge is triggered by providing a starting plasma with a focused laser beam by means of a pulse sequence, consisting of at least two laser pulses emitted consecutively from the laser radiation source.

title: Method and device for correcting the shape of an optical component by means of laser radiation
abstract: The present invention relates to a method and to a device for correcting the shape of an optical component (1) using pulsed laser radiation. For this purpose, the component (1) is measured and excess material (7) is determined by way of comparison with a target geometry (6) and is at least partially removed by machining using at least one pulsed laser beam (4) with pulse durations of > 1 μs in order to at least approximate the actual geometry (5) to the target geometry (6). During machining, the component (1) is rotated at a rotational speed about an axis of rotation, wherein the distance of the laser beam (4) to the axis of rotation is changed at least temporarily. The rotational speed, the beam diameter of the laser beam (4) on the component (1) and the temporal pulse interval between the pulses of the laser beam (4) are selected such that material regions of the component (1) removed by successive pulses of the laser beam (4) do not overlap.
